common.translategemmaUnavailable: TranslateGemma node unavailable. Please verify the local server (LM Studio / llama.cpp / Ollama) is running and the URL is correct.

novelProcessor.title: Novel Text Formatter
novelProcessor.description: One-click fix for formatting issues in downloaded novels, with smart line-break layout
novelProcessor.metaTitle: Web Novel TXT Formatter | Chapter Split & Kindle Export
novelProcessor.metaDescription: Web novel TXT a mess? One-click fix for line breaks, chapter splits, dedup, and Traditional/Simplified conversion. Kindle and FBReader compatible.

faq.q: My downloaded TXT novel has messy formatting — what issues can this tool fix?
faq.a: Fixes 7 common web-novel TXT problems: paragraphs broken into short lines, extra blank lines at paragraph ends, chapter headings missing line breaks, missing paragraph indentation, ad lines mixed in, inconsistent full-width/half-width spaces, and mixed Traditional/Simplified characters. Works for browser copy-paste, Word-exported TXT, fanfic compilations, and more. Check the rules you need and batch-fix in one pass; each rule can also be enabled individually. Supports novels of 3 million+ characters without slowdown.

faq.q: Will the tool accidentally delete actual story content or dialogue? How does duplicate detection work?
faq.a: Duplicate detection only targets content that appears identically on 3 or more consecutive lines (e.g. a repeated ad like "First published at xxx"). Short character responses like "Yes" or "Mm" in the body text are never removed, because the algorithm detects consecutive repetition, not single-line duplicates. Back up the original before processing; a body word-count change of less than 5% after processing confirms safety. Chapter splitting uses regex to match patterns like "Chapter X", "Chapter X", "X." and similar common formats.

faq.q: Can the formatted TXT be used directly with Kindle, FBReader, and other e-readers? Are chapter tables of contents generated automatically?
faq.a: Processed TXT meets the format requirements of Kindle (push email), FBReader, and other readers. Enabling "Chapter Split" adds a blank line before each chapter so Kindle can auto-generate a table of contents. TTS users can enable "Remove Duplicate Lines" and "Junk Filter" to avoid the reader speaking ad content.

howto.name: Import web novel or fiction text
howto.text: Paste text or upload a TXT file — no size limit, handles novels over 3 million characters. Works for TXT downloads from sites like Biquge, browser web copy, Word TXT exports, fan fiction, original writing, and more.

howto.name: Configure repair rule combinations
howto.text: Check the rules you need: smart line breaks (fix mis-split paragraphs), chapter splitting (blank line before each chapter), first-line indent (2 chars), duplicate-line removal (strip ads), Traditional-to-Simplified conversion, junk content filter. Rules stack, or enable individually.

howto.name: Export reader-friendly TXT
howto.text: Send the export directly to Kindle via send-to-email, or import locally into Kobo, FBReader, or Moon+ Reader. With chapter splitting enabled, Kindle auto-generates a table of contents. For Kobo or non-Kindle readers, convert to EPUB via Calibre first for the best TOC experience.

features: Fixes 7 common format issues in web novel TXT files (downloads, web copy-paste, Word exports)
Auto-detects chapter titles like 「第X章」 or Chapter X and splits them
Adjacent duplicate-line detection — identical consecutive lines like repeated ad banners are removed
First-line indent (2 chars), strips extra blank lines, repairs mis-split short lines
Handles novels over 3 million characters with fast processing
Compatible with Kindle Send-to-Email, Kobo, FBReader, and Moon+ Reader

CopyToClipboard.unsupported: Browser does not support clipboard, please copy manually

NovelProcessor.description: Designed for formatting web novel text, fixing layout issues from downloaded novels with one click. Features include smart line breaks, chapter splitting, paragraph indentation, Traditional/Simplified conversion, duplicate line removal, and junk content filtering — turning messy novel text into clean, readable content.
NovelProcessor.errorNoInput: Please enter or paste text to process
NovelProcessor.errorNoFile: Please upload a file to process
NovelProcessor.warningNoText: Please enter or paste text first
NovelProcessor.infoNoChapters: No valid chapter headings detected, reorder unavailable
NovelProcessor.tooltipSmartLineBreak: Smart Line Break: auto-optimize line breaks based on punctuation, merge fragmented paragraphs
NovelProcessor.tooltipIndent: Paragraph Indent: automatically add two full-width spaces at the start of each paragraph
NovelProcessor.tooltipTrim: Smart Trim: automatically remove leading/trailing spaces from each line
NovelProcessor.tooltipParagraphSplit: Long Paragraph Optimization: auto-split overly long paragraphs for better mobile reading
NovelProcessor.tooltipConversion: Convert between Simplified and Traditional Chinese throughout the text (powered by OpenCC)
NovelProcessor.rulesInactiveHint: Active only when Traditional/Simplified conversion is enabled
NovelProcessor.tooltipChapterSplit: Chapter Detection: automatically detect and format chapter headings like "Chapter X"
NovelProcessor.tooltipLineEndNumbers: Remove trailing numbers: strip page numbers or statistics at line ends (only if line length > 10)
NovelProcessor.tooltipChapterSplitOnly: Chapter Split Only: split on chapter headings only, do not modify other content
NovelProcessor.tooltipChapterReorder: Chapter Reorder: reorder the entire novel by chapter numbers

ProtectedRuleManager.description: Rules take priority over the built-in dictionary — matched terms are not converted by OpenCC. On import, duplicate source entries are automatically removed (the last one wins).
ProtectedRuleManager.confirmClearAll: Clear all rules for the current direction?
ProtectedRuleManager.importHint: Import supports OpenCC format text (each line: key[TAB]value, lines starting with # are comments). Rules are appended to the current direction; duplicate sources are removed automatically.
ProtectedRuleManager.puaSanitized: PUA characters (internal placeholder range) automatically removed
ProtectedRuleManager.importNoRules: No valid rules found in file (OpenCC format: each line key[TAB]value)
ProtectedRuleManager.importedWithDedup: Imported {added} rule(s) to {direction}, automatically removed {dedup} duplicate source(s)
ProtectedRuleManager.shadowedTooltip: Shadowed by row {rowNumber}; effective result is "{winnerTo}"
ProtectedRuleManager.emptyTable: No rules yet. Click "Add Rule" to get started.
ProtectedRuleManager.enableProtectedRulesTooltip: When off, the rules below are ignored for this conversion
ProtectedRuleManager.customReplaceTooltip: Matched terms bypass the OpenCC built-in dictionary; managed separately by direction (Simplified → Traditional / Traditional → Simplified)
